## Entry

- **id**: `<your-id>`
- **source**: `https://...`
- **description**:

## Checklist

- [ ] `id` is lowercase-hyphenated and unique
- [ ] `source` is a stable public docs URL (not a version-pinned deep link)
- [ ] `aliases` (if any) are specific, not generic like `docs` / `api`
- [ ] `registry.json` still parses as valid JSON
- [ ] I ran `doc0 doctor` locally against my fork and it reports `ok` for this entry
